text.title: vui-privacy-security Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure to apply the vui-privacy-security methodology end-to-end.

step.name: data-inventory
step.action: Per intent, list fields captured (PII? health? financial?). Tag jurisdictional scope.

step.name: transparency-and-consent
step.action: Draft notice-at-collection per jurisdiction. Add consent gate on first capture.
step.decision-gate: Reject if any jurisdiction lacks notice.

step.name: trust-indicators
step.action: Ensure LED/icon + chime tied to recording state. Document fail-safe (chime if LED broken).

step.name: step-up-auth
step.action: Wire PIN / biometric / 2FA for each. No exceptions.

step.name: redaction-and-retention
step.action: Add on-device redaction (NER + regex) before transmission. Set retention ≤30 days. Expose deletion control.
